nodes.label: AI as time-saving editing tool
nodes.grounding_span: Editing has been so much easier to do and takes way less time now that AI has taken over a big chunk of that

nodes.label: AI as learning assistant for new techniques
nodes.grounding_span: I needed the help of AI to learn how to do so without having to go through multiple YouTube videos

nodes.label: AI for business communication tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have AI help me make email campaigns to reach out to possible clients

nodes.label: AI's seamless object removal and replacement
nodes.label_negative: Manual object removal with imperfect results
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped with that process in that it removes, AND adds in background based on the surrounding image and it looks seamless

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: Initially, its me who drives what exactly I want to be removed, but after that, it is all up to the AI to 'make' the decisions

nodes.label: Low barrier to entry threatening job security
nodes.label_negative: High barrier to entry protecting job security
nodes.grounding_span: the barrier to entry might become too low and my clients will turn to AI to do their own editing

nodes.label: Irreplaceable human expertise in photography
nodes.grounding_span: without the proper techniques for taking photos, no amount of editing can turn a horrible picture into something great

nodes.label: AI's future capability in video editing
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI evolving to a place where editing videos will be as easy as editing photos

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: allows me to have more time doing other activities than just work

nodes.label: Continuous learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I needed the help of AI to learn how to do so

nodes.label: Client satisfaction and timely delivery
nodes.grounding_span: allows me to get images back to my clients in a timely manner

nodes.label: Professional autonomy and control
nodes.grounding_span: Initially, its me who drives what exactly I want to be removed

nodes.label: Job security and competitive advantage
nodes.grounding_span: my job will not go away any time soon

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI's time-saving editing
nodes.grounding_span: Editing has been so much easier to do and takes way less time

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for learning new techniques
nodes.grounding_span: I needed the help of AI to learn how to do so

nodes.label: Positive use of AI for business communication
nodes.grounding_span: using AI allows me to have more time to actually interact with the people I currently work with

nodes.label: Positive satisfaction with AI's seamless object removal
nodes.grounding_span: it looks seamless

nodes.label: Ambivalent about control over AI's decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not sure if I would be able to control the level of control in which the AI chooses to replace items with

nodes.label: Concern about low barrier to entry
nodes.grounding_span: the barrier to entry might become too low and my clients will turn to AI to do their own editing

nodes.label: Confidence in irreplaceable human expertise
nodes.grounding_span: without the proper techniques for taking photos, no amount of editing can turn a horrible picture into something great

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of AI's video editing capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: can't wait to see how AI will help with what I've already explained

nodes.label: Pragmatic task delegation — uses AI for specific, bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI through Adobe Lightroom to do so

nodes.label: Forward-looking anticipation — projects future AI capabilities onto current needs
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI evolving to a place where editing videos will be as easy as editing photos
